notes: probed 2026-07-07: SFCC. robots→sitemap_index.xml→sitemap_0-product.xml (~2.9k products, ~1k dress URLs). Per-size Offers with size/color/availability/USD price. Sizes numeric (000–012). Descriptions short; no length text in JSON-LD (AI pipeline estimates from image).

probed 2026-07-07: custom platform. Dedicated products sitemap (~9.3k URLs, ~5.2k dress). Single Offer, USD, no sizes in JSON-LD (sizes live client-side). Long descriptions frequently state lengths/measurements — good hem-text quality. og:image present.

probed 2026-07-07: SFCC. sitemap_index→…product.xml (~2.6k products). Single Offer, USD, no sizes in JSON-LD. Dress PDPs carry /dresses-skirts/ category path — downstream dress filter removes the skirts.

probed 2026-07-07: SFCC. sitemap_index→sitemap_0.xml (~4.6k URLs, ~900 dress). JSON-LD contains RAW control characters (connector's recovery pass handles it). Single Offer, GBP. Descriptions state explicit garment length (e.g. 'Length: 145cm') + model height — best-in-list hem data. 4+ images.

probed 2026-07-07: Shopify with products.json disabled — JSON-LD renders. @graph-wrapped Product; per-size offers with size in offer name ('… - XXS / Cream'). THEME BUG: price field is integer cents rendered as dollars (21299.00 for a $212.99 dress) → priceDivisor 100, verified against on-site price.

probed 2026-07-08 (3 PDPs): BigCommerce stencil. xmlsitemap.php index → type=products child (~190 products; URLs lack 'dress' so no crawl-order boost, but 190 < page cap). PDPs are MICRODATA-only (zero JSON-LD): Product scope with name (h1) + description (article) + single Offer → nested PriceSpecification metas (price/priceCurrency USD) + availability meta; category ONLY in BreadcrumbList microdata ('Mini Dresses'/'Midi Dresses'/'Knitwear'… — drives the dress filter); no image/brand/sku itemprops → og:image fallback supplies the image, brand falls back to displayName; sizes are client-side only (like lulus/madewell). Descriptions state model heights ('Alex 5'3 wears S and Gabriella 5'9 wears XS') — good for lengths v2 anchoring.
probed 2026-07-07: custom Next.js storefront. No Sitemap: line in robots.txt; /sitemap.xml and common variants serve the SPA homepage HTML. No sitemap → no discovery path.

probed 2026-07-07: ProductGroup JSON-LD present but offers/price are server-rendered inconsistently — a girls' PDP had price, the women's dress checked had hasVariant:[] and no offers. Revisit; may work for a subset.

probed 2026-07-07: Product JSON-LD parsed cleanly on the first PDP hit (price, availability, image), but bot protection started returning 403 after a handful of polite requests. Unreliable for a daily crawl — skip.
probed 2026-07-07: SFCC. US product sitemap works (~1.3k products, dress- URL prefix), but ProductGroup ships hasVariant:[] and no offers server-side — no price in JSON-LD.
probed 2026-07-07: Magento. Locale sitemaps mix category and product URLs with no distinguishing product pattern; the dress-keyword URLs sampled were category pages with zero JSON-LD blocks.
probed 2026-07-07: URBN platform — robots.txt itself returns 403 (bot-blocked). Do not crawl.
probed 2026-07-07: URBN platform — 403 bot-blocked, same as Anthropologie.
probed 2026-07-07: H&M group — 403 bot-blocked at robots.txt.
probed 2026-07-07: sitemaps reachable (gzipped, per-locale) but PDPs return 403 to bots.
known bot-blocker (403 on 2026-07-06 Shopify-track probe) — skipped by design, no new requests sent.
known bot-blocker (403 on 2026-07-06 Shopify-track probe) — skipped by design, no new requests sent.
